speaker: speaker1
text: This is your song . I picked it for you .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thank you . You are so considerate .

speaker: speaker1
text: Push the red button on the mike to turn it on .

speaker: speaker2
text: OK . This key is too high for me .

speaker: speaker1
text: I think it's a piece of cake for you .

speaker: speaker2
text: OK . Let me have a try ...

speaker: speaker1
text: Well done ! I hope I can sing as well as you one day .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thank you . I'm sure you will .

speaker: speaker1
text: I hope so . Thank you for saying so .
